# @sparkmate/ui

Machine-readable usage guide for coding agents and LLMs.

## Package
- Name: `@sparkmate/ui`
- CSS import required: `@sparkmate/ui/styles.css`
- JS import: `@sparkmate/ui`

## Core Rules
- Always import styles once at app root:
  - `import '@sparkmate/ui/styles.css'`
- Package is router-agnostic:
  - consumer owns `pathname` and `onNavigate`
- Package does not provide app nav config:
  - consumer must provide `groups: NavGroup[]`
- Sidebar supports slots:
  - `afterNavMain`, `beforeNavUser`
- Nav group supports icon or image:
  - `icon?: LucideIcon`
  - `imageSrc?: string`, `imageAlt?: string`

## Primary Components
- `AppSidebar`
- `AgentChat`
- `NavMain`
- `NavUser`
- Full shadcn/ui exports from package root

## Minimal App Shell Example
```tsx
import '@sparkmate/ui/styles.css'
import { AppSidebar, SidebarProvider, SidebarInset, type NavGroup } from '@sparkmate/ui'

const groups: NavGroup[] = [{ title: 'Home', path: '/', items: [] }]

<SidebarProvider>
  <AppSidebar
    groups={groups}
    pathname={pathname}
    onNavigate={navigate}
    user={{ name: 'User', email: 'user@sparkmate.com' }}
  />
  <SidebarInset>{children}</SidebarInset>
</SidebarProvider>
```

## Minimal Chat Example
```tsx
import { AgentChat } from '@sparkmate/ui'

<AgentChat
  onSubmit={async (text) => ({ role: 'assistant', content: `Echo: ${text}` })}
/>
```

## More
- Full guide: `./llms-full.txt`
- Consumer contract: `./docs/CONSUMER-CONTRACT.md`
